professions.title: Investment Banker
professions.description: Investment bankers in the llamaverse advise corporate clients on mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. The profession is well-compensated and famously demanding; it is not uncommon for senior bankers at firms such as WoolStreet and HayBale Capital to work eighteen-hour days during deal periods. The sector is dominated by graduates of the Andes Business School, whose alumni network controls an estimated 34 percent of llamaverse corporate M&A activity.
professions.secretPowerAdvantage: Time Whisperer — enables accurate market timing
